lint-all.observation: All 3 samples passed validation: kanban, mobile-onboarding, cli-dashboard

test.observation: 0 tests (tests for m2-linter-ci milestone not yet implemented)

lint.observation: Shows usage message when run without files - linter itself is functional

blockingIssues.description: SPEC.md embedded JSON schema (lines 615-617) state type enum has only 6 values while schema.json has 13 values. VAL-SPEC-001 pass criteria states 'No types present in one but not the other' - the embedded schema in SPEC.md must match schema.json exactly.
blockingIssues.evidence: SPEC.md line 617: enum with 6 types; schema.json line 43: enum with 13 types including idle, scrollback, editing, search-active, streaming, refreshing, field-selected
blockingIssues.fixRequired: Update SPEC.md embedded schema state type enum to include all 13 types

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update Error 10 (Invalid Back-Stack Behavior) to include 'Pop' as a valid back-stack value, consistent with SPEC.md Section 6.5 and Appendix A which now list Push, Replace, Pop, No, Modal.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: spec-schema-backstack-alignment review found AGENTS.md line 363 still shows only 4 values: Push, Replace, No, Modal. SPEC.md Section 6.5 and Appendix A now correctly include Pop.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify VAL-SPEC-001: The pass criteria mentions '13 types (v1.1 extended set)' but the blocking issue description says 'requires exactly 6 state types'. The evidence in the contract states schema.json line 43 has 13 types. Need to clarify if VAL-SPEC-001 should pass (prose + schema.json both have 13) or fail (embedded schema in SPEC.md has 6).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: VAL-SPEC-001 pass criteria: 'SPEC.md prose enumerates...13 total. schema.json enum contains exactly these 13 values.' Blocking issue: 'VAL-SPEC-001 requires exactly 6 state types'. These statements are contradictory.

nonBlockingIssues.description: SPEC.md embedded JSON schema example in Section 11 still shows backStack enum as ["Push", "Replace", "No", "Modal"] missing Pop. Prose sections 6.5 and Appendix A correctly include Pop.
nonBlockingIssues.evidence: SPEC.md Section 11 embedded schema example has 4 values; Section 6.5 and Appendix A have 5 values including Pop

blockingIssues.description: VAL-SPEC-001 requires exactly 6 state types but spec now has 13
